principle: Natural-language intent belongs to the LLM TaskSpec planner. Deterministic code validates schemas, canonicalizes capabilities, applies policy/runtime guards, executes bounded tools, recovers, retries, and renders.

allowed_deterministic_roles: literal URL, git remote, and explicit shell-command structural fallback

surfaces.legacy_note: The live codex-local path must delegate natural language to GATEWAY_ADMIN_AGENT_LOOP. Older helper functions remain for compatibility and explicit admin paths, not as the reasoning layer.

surfaces.planned_replacement: TaskSpec planner, capability registry, workspace runner, and self-improve offload routines.

surfaces.legacy_note: Failure classification may use deterministic markers for recovery artifacts, but OpenWebUI chat intent routing must stay in the LLM TaskSpec path.
